---
title: "11 Sensitivity Analysis (The Influence)"
---

## 11.1 Tools to get the job done
-   R scripts/tools
-   (formalize process/script and add the RHESSysIOinR?)

## 11.1 Identifying influential variables

-   discern what processes different parameters affect
-   parameter interactions


## 11.2 Parameter Space Characterization
-   establishing realistic bounds/ranges
-   literature reference
-   sampling parameter space

## 11.3 Running simulation iterations
-   R functions/tools

##  11.3 Parameter Selection
-   defining target output
-   uncertainty
-   parameter importance tools?
-   analyzing & ranking performance


#
